Subject: Dashboard not loading correctly
Body: The main dashboard takes too long to load and sometimes shows blank screen.
Answer: Clear browser cache, check internet speed, and ensure you are using a supported browser version.

Subject: Export to PDF not working
Body: When user clicks export to PDF button nothing happens. No error message shown.
Answer: Disable popup blocker in browser settings. Allow downloads from the application domain.

Subject: Search filter not returning correct results
Body: Search filter by date range returns wrong results or no results at all.
Answer: Check date format settings in user preferences. Ensure timezone is set correctly.
